_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
This document covers Singapore's Maritime and Port Authority (MPA) Shipping Circular No. 12 of 2024, published 29 October 2024, which revises the Green Ship Programme component of the Maritime Singapore Green Initiative (MSGI) for Singapore-registered ships. It is produced for a freight forwarding workspace with ocean as its tertiary transport mode, operating across Asia trade lanes, handling cargo verticals that include live events, fine art, luxury goods, film and TV, high-value automotive, and humanitarian goods.

**Scope limitation:** The primary source document (MPA Shipping Circular No. 12 of 2024) is accessible as a scanned or non-text PDF (`sc_no_12_of_2024.pdf`, 285 KB), and its full programme text was not returned in the source content provided to this system. The circular's title, issuing body, date, and programme name are confirmed from the MPA media page. Specific revised thresholds, revised rebate rates, revised eligibility criteria, and any new fuel or technology categories introduced by the revision are **not confirmed from the source content provided**. Claims based solely on those parameters are omitted under the Integrity Rule. Where the prior programme structure is described, it is drawn from the MPA Maritime Singapore Green Initiative overview page and the MPA Decarbonisation Blueprint page, both available in the source pool, and labeled accordingly.

**Convention:** All regulatory obligations belong to vessel operators and shipowners, not to freight forwarders. The workspace's relevance is as a buyer of ocean freight services routing cargo through Singapore and as a party whose vessel selection and routing decisions interact with the incentive structure this programme creates. Nothing in this document constitutes legal advice. Items requiring legal review are labeled **Legal Confirmation Required**.

*Source: MPA Shipping Circular No. 12 of 2024, Maritime and Port Authority of Singapore, 29 Oct 2024. https://www.mpa.gov.sg/media-centre/details/no.-12-of-2024---revisions-to-the-maritime-singapore-green-initiative---green-ship-programme-for-singapore-registered-ships*

---
